dataset.description: This dataset provides comprehensive agricultural data for Rajasthan, India from 2018 to 2019. It contains four tabless: Crop_Production_Data, Water_Usage_Data, Soil_Analysis_Data, and Crop_Price_Data. This dataset will be a valuable resource for researchers and data scientists working in the agricultural sector, enabling them to analyze and model various aspects of agricultural practices and market dynamics in Rajasthan.

columns.description: Administerative region in Rajasthan where crop price data was recorded
columns.name: District

columns.description: Type of agricultural product being traded in regional markets
columns.name: Crop

columns.description: Specific Agricultural Produce Market Committee (APMC) mandi where transactions occurred
columns.name: Market

columns.description: Transaction date recorded in YYYY-MM-DD format
columns.name: Date

columns.description: Commodity price per quintal (100kg) in Indian Rupees
columns.name: Price (INR/quintal)

columns.description: Administrative region recording agricultural output
columns.name: District

columns.description: Cultivated plant species harvested in the region
columns.name: Crop

columns.description: Growing season classification (Kharif/Rabi) based on monsoon patterns
columns.name: Season

columns.description: Land surface dedicated to cultivating the specified crop
columns.name: Area (hectares)

columns.description: Agricultural output per hectare of cultivated land
columns.name: Yield (quintals)

columns.description: Total crop output converted to metric tonnes
columns.name: Production (metric tons)

columns.description: Geographical region where soil samples were collected
columns.name: District

columns.description: Pedological classification based on composition and characteristics
columns.name: Soil Type

columns.description: Measure of soil acidity/alkalinity affecting nutrient availability
columns.name: pH Level

columns.description: Percentage of decomposed plant/animal material in soil composition
columns.name: Organic Matter (%)

columns.description: Measured nitrogen levels critical for plant growth in topsoil layer
columns.name: Nitrogen Content (kg/ha)

columns.description: Available phosphorus essential for root/flower development
columns.name: Phosphorus Content (kg/ha)

columns.description: Potassium concentration influencing plant disease resistance
columns.name: Potassium Content (kg/ha)

columns.description: Administrative unit tracking agricultural water management
columns.name: District

columns.description: Agricultural product requiring irrigation resources
columns.name: Crop

columns.description: Water application technique (Drip/Sprinkler/Canal/Tube Well)
columns.name: Irrigation Method

columns.description: Actual water usage per hectare for crop cultivation
columns.name: Water Consumption (liters/hectare)

columns.description: Accessible water resources per hectare accounting for regional constraints
columns.name: Water Availability (liters/hectare)

desc: This dataset provides comprehensive agricultural data for Rajasthan, India from 2018 to 2019. It contains four tabless: Crop_Production_Data, Water_Usage_Data, Soil_Analysis_Data, and Crop_Price_Data. This dataset will be a valuable resource for researchers and data scientists working in the agricultural sector, enabling them to analyze and model various aspects of agricultural practices and market dynamics in Rajasthan.
goal: Analyze the relationship between soil type, nutrient content (e.g., organic matter, nitrogen, phosphorus, potassium), and crop yield in different districts, providing insights for soil improvement and precision agriculture practices.
name: Visual Analytics System agriculture_goal3_1742654907

plan.path: The user starts with View 1 (Overview) to identify nutrient-yield correlations across districts through scatterplot matrix brushing. Selections automatically filter View 2 (Exploration) showing soil type productivity relationships. Clicking soil bars in View 2 updates View 3 (Exploration) with granular organic matter analysis. All filters propagate to View 4 (Insight) where parallel coordinates reveal complex soil-yield profiles.

views.components: Row of dropdowns to select specific nutrients vs yield comparisons

effect.description: Brushed regions filter districts and nutrient/yield ranges

visualization.description: Faceted scatterplot matrix showing pairwise relationships between soil nutrients (X-axes) and crop yield (Y-axes). Districts encoded by color, with interactive brushing across plots.

effect.description: Selected soil types propagate to subsequent views

visualization.description: Grouped bar chart showing soil type frequency per district with overlaid yield line
encodings: y2:Yield (quintals) using line mark with secondary axis

visualization.description: Horizontal box plots showing organic matter distribution across soil types
Parallel coordinates plot showing multi-parameter relationships for districts

data.reason: Prevents skewed correlations from multiple crop entries per district in original join
data.requirement: Aggregate crop_production_data yields at district level before joining with soil data

data.reason: Error encountered near '(', indicating syntax errors in the SQL code. Modification of queries is necessary to resolve this issue.
data.requirement: Ensure that queries are syntactically correct

interaction.reason: For clearer and more relevant insights.
interaction.requirement: Replace season filter with crop-type filter, as soil properties affect different crops uniquely

interaction.reason: District-level zooming allows for more focused analysis and detailed insights.
interaction.requirement: Add district-level zooming interaction, as it provides a more comprehensive view of data

visualization.reason: Parallel coordinates plot is not allowed, and a grouped bar chart is a suitable alternative for showing soil type distribution with average yield.
visualization.requirement: Use vertical grouped bar chart instead of parallel coordinates plot due to compliance with allowed visualization types

visualization.reason: There is already a new requirement for aggregating crop yields, which should replace the previous one.
visualization.requirement: Remove existing correlation requirement linked with 'D2' to avoid duplication

visualization.reason: Parallel coordinates plot is not available, so a bubble chart is used. However, ensure that the data is in an appropriate format for a bubble chart.
visualization.requirement: Use bubble chart instead of parallel coordinates plot for clustering capability, but restrict its use based on the correct data format

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_combined_soil_crop AS SELECT soil_analysis_data.District, soil_analysis_data.Soil Type, soil_analysis_data.Organic Matter (%), soil_analysis_data.Nitrogen Content (kg/ha), soil_analysis_data.Phosphorus Content (kg/ha), soil_analysis_data.Potassium Content (kg/ha), crop_production_data.Yield (quintals) FROM soil_analysis_data JOIN crop_production_data ON soil_analysis_data.District = crop_production_data.District;
sqls.name: vw_combined_soil_crop

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_soil_crop_district AS SELECT soil_analysis_data.District, soil_analysis_data.Soil Type, soil_analysis_data.Organic Matter (%), soil_analysis_data.Nitrogen Content (kg/ha), soil_analysis_data.Phosphorus Content (kg/ha), soil_analysis_data.Potassium Content (kg/ha) FROM soil_analysis_data JOIN crop_production_data ON soil_analysis_data.District = crop_production_data.District;
sqls.name: vw_soil_crop_district

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_soil_type AS SELECT soil_analysis_data.Soil Type FROM soil_analysis_data;
sqls.name: vw_soil_type

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW vw_district AS SELECT soil_analysis_data.District FROM soil_analysis_data;
sqls.name: vw_district

tasks.method: Scatterplot matrix with linked brushing. Each scatterplot shows pairwise relationships between soil nutrients and crop yield. Districts encoded through color. Interaction includes zooming and tooltip details.
tasks.objective: Identify key nutrient-yield correlations to prioritize soil enhancement strategies

tasks.method: Vertical grouped bar chart per district. X-axis: Soil types, grouped bars show frequency. Secondary axis line chart overlays average yield. Color encoding distinguishes soil prevalence vs yield metrics.
tasks.objective: Compare soil type distribution with agricultural productivity across districts

tasks.method: Box plots arranged horizontally. X-axis: Soil type categories. Y-axis: Organic Matter (%) ranges. Whiskers show min/max, boxes show quartiles. Interactive hover reveals district distribution details.
tasks.objective: Analyze organic matter variability across soil types to identify amendment priorities

tasks.method: Parallel coordinates plot showing interactions between pH, nitrogen, and yield. Districts encoded as polylines. Brushing filters clusters of similar soil-yield profiles.
tasks.objective: Discover combinations of pH/nitrogen levels associated with high yield clusters

tasks.method: Cascading filter system. Primary filter: Season (Kharif/Rabi). Updates linked bubble charts showing soil type vs yield size-encoded by production. Color indicates district.
tasks.objective: Assess seasonal variations in soil-yield relationships for crop rotation planning

tasks.method: Bidirectional bar chart. Left bars show districts with highest phosphorus levels. Right bars show districts with highest yields. Connecting lines highlight mismatches for targeted interventions.
tasks.objective: Identify districts needing phosphorus optimization despite high yields
